mnemonics: EAT-D: Extract, Analyze, Transform, Deliver - the path information takes to the user's plate.
keyPoints: Information delivery is the process of providing data and insights to business users from the data warehouse.
It utilizes tools like reporting, dashboards, OLAP, and data mining to make data accessible and useful.
The goal is to support strategic decision-making by presenting the right information to the right user at the right time.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on the technical ETL process and neglecting the end-user delivery interface and experience.
Delivering raw, un-analyzed data instead of processed, contextualized information that is ready for decision-making.
